name: InputMessageGroupWithTemplate

only on ng-content selector this will allow you to put any content as trigger.

inputs.name: triggers
inputs.description:
To allow user to determine what event he wants to trigger the messages to show
Accepts any [HTML DOM Events](https://www.w3schools.com/jsref/dom_obj_event.asp).

methods.name: openChanged
methods.description: Function is called every time message changes isOpen attribute
